title: Kochi、Kerala — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Kochi、Kerala的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Kochi是Kerala的一個城市，人口約2,100,000。The commercial capital of Kerala, a historic port city with Chinese fishing nets, colonial architecture, and a thriving IT sector.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
